title: Vendor homepage in marketplace

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
This request is for a vendor or developer homepage in the app marketplace.

It would list all the apps built by a developer and could optionally contain links to the developer website, contact, etc.

I reposted this on behalf of @dvdsmpsn from this thread

posts.author: hollywright (Holly Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please! Thank you @dipro and @dvdsmpsn!

posts.author: jari (Jari worsley)
posts.cookedHtml:
absolutely yes
and some extra characters to pad to 15
did I say yes already?
